steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank sits between 'her' and 'Gothic'—which is part of the proper noun title 'Mexican Gothic'. The complete noun phrase is followed by '(2020) earning a spot', where the participial phrase 'earning a spot' modifies the entire noun phrase.

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content:
When a proper noun title directly identifies a noun, no punctuation is required between them. 'Her novel Mexican Gothic' demonstrates this correctly without a boundary mark.
Options C and D incorrectly add boundary punctuation (colon and comma, respectively), while option A has an unclosed parenthesis.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
